==={{aniseries|JN}}===
[[File:Mallow JN.png|thumb|250px|Mallow in {{aniseries|JN}}]]
In ''[[JN037|That New Old Gang of Mine!]]'', Mallow helped organize a welcome party for Ash and [[Goh]] when they came to visit Alola. She later joined her classmates in watching a battle between Goh and Kiawe.

In ''[[JN112|Helping the Hometown Hero!]]'', Mallow attended a party to celebrate the return of Lillie and her family to Alola after they found Mohn, reuniting with Lillie, Ash, and Goh and meeting [[Chloe]]. The next day, Mallow watched a [[Battle Royal]] match between Ash, Kiawe, Gladion, and Professor Kukui.

In ''[[JN131|Paring Pokémon While Parrying!]]'' and ''[[JN132|Partners in Time!]]'', Mallow was seen watching Ash's [[Masters Eight Tournament]] match against {{an|Leon}} at the [[Pokémon School]].
